'''âl-k-f''' ('''kalakaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:phagocytose|phagocytose]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-k-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:phagocytose|phagocytose]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-k-f
|-
! Lemma
| kalakaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilakaf|thilakaf]] || [[word:jilakaf|jilakaf]] || [[word:shilakaf|shilakaf]] || [[word:kilakaf|kilakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulakaf|thuthulakaf]] || [[word:jujulakaf|jujulakaf]] || [[word:shushulakaf|shushulakaf]] || [[word:kukulakaf|kukulakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulakaf|thulakaf]] || [[word:julakaf|julakaf]] || [[word:shulakaf|shulakaf]] || [[word:kulakaf|kulakaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulakaf|thulakaf]] || [[word:julakaf|julakaf]] || [[word:shulakaf|shulakaf]] || [[word:kulakaf|kulakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelakaf|thelakaf]] || [[word:jelakaf|jelakaf]] || [[word:shelakaf|shelakaf]] || [[word:kelakaf|kelakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholakaf|thotholakaf]] || [[word:jojolakaf|jojolakaf]] || [[word:shosholakaf|shosholakaf]] || [[word:kokolakaf|kokolakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholakaf|tholakaf]] || [[word:jolakaf|jolakaf]] || [[word:sholakaf|sholakaf]] || [[word:kolakaf|kolakaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholakaf|tholakaf]] || [[word:jolakaf|jolakaf]] || [[word:sholakaf|sholakaf]] || [[word:kolakaf|kolakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlakaf|thĂŠlakaf]] || [[word:jĂŠlakaf|jĂŠlakaf]] || [[word:shĂŠlakaf|shĂŠlakaf]] || [[word:kĂŠlakaf|kĂŠlakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalakaf|thathalakaf]] || [[word:jajalakaf|jajalakaf]] || [[word:shashalakaf|shashalakaf]] || [[word:kakalakaf|kakalakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalakaf|thalakaf]] || [[word:jalakaf|jalakaf]] || [[word:shalakaf|shalakaf]] || [[word:kalakaf|kalakaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalakaf|thalakaf]] || [[word:jalakaf|jalakaf]] || [[word:shalakaf|shalakaf]] || [[word:kalakaf|kalakaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalakaf|shalakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalakaf|goshalakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalakaf|gokishalakaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalakafnĂŒ|shalakafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalakafnknĂŒ|goshalakafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalakafnĂŒ|gokishalakafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalakafshĂ«|shalakafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalakafnkshĂ«|goshalakafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalakafshĂ«|gokishalakafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalakafro|shalakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalakafnkro|goshalakafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalakafro|gokishalakafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalakafmu|shalakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalakafnkmu|goshalakafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalakafmu|gokishalakafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalakafsher|shalakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalakafnksher|goshalakafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalakafsher|gokishalakafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalakafng|shalakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalakafnkng|goshalakafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalakafng|gokishalakafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalakafya|shalakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalakafnkya|goshalakafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalakafya|gokishalakafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalakafyam|shalakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalakafnkyam|goshalakafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalakafyam|gokishalakafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalakafnĂŒshĂ«|shalakafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalakafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalakafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalakafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalakafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalakafnĂŒro|shalakafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalakafnknĂŒro|goshalakafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalakafnĂŒro|gokishalakafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalakafnĂŒmu|shalakafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalakafnknĂŒmu|goshalakafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalakafnĂŒmu|gokishalakafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalakafshĂ«nĂŒ|shalakafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalakafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalakafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalakafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalakafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalakafshĂ«ro|shalakafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalakafnkshĂ«ro|goshalakafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalakafshĂ«ro|gokishalakafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalakafshĂ«mu|shalakafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalakafnkshĂ«mu|goshalakafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalakafshĂ«mu|gokishalakafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalakafronĂŒ|shalakafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalakafnkronĂŒ|goshalakafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalakafronĂŒ|gokishalakafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalakafroshĂ«|shalakafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalakafnkroshĂ«|goshalakafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalakafroshĂ«|gokishalakafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalakafromu|shalakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalakafnkromu|goshalakafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalakafromu|gokishalakafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalakafmunĂŒ|shalakafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalakafnkmunĂŒ|goshalakafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalakafmunĂŒ|gokishalakafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalakafmushĂ«|shalakafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalakafnkmushĂ«|goshalakafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalakafmushĂ«|gokishalakafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalakafmuro|shalakafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalakafnkmuro|goshalakafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalakafmuro|gokishalakafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|27df60f}}
